examples: For you are in Elysium, and you already dead!
And the other thing - those kidnappings by rebels in Elysium?
Your daughter is well, she lives among the pure souls in the Elysium Fields.
He labelled one region Eden, another Elysium, others, on later maps, Arcadia and Utopia.
Their new show, The Crash of the Elysium, will be the company's first for children.
